markets.question: Tacoma Defiance vs Los Angeles FC II
markets.description:
MLS Next Pro match between Tacoma Defiance (home) and Los Angeles FC II (away) on Monday, March 2, 2026, kick-off at 03:00 AM UTC.

Predict the full-time result: Tacoma Defiance win, Draw, or Los Angeles FC II win.

Resolution Rules:
• Resolves based on the final score at full time (90 minutes + stoppage time).
• Extra time and penalty shootouts DO NOT count — only the 90-minute result matters.
• If the match is postponed or abandoned before completion, the market will be voided and all bets refunded.
• Data source: API-Sports (official match result).
